information.notes:
Lambda is a street chemist who makes his own fun and keeps things practical. His claim to fame is a regular scheduled upload of "Lambda's Land," a science show he dumps on the Night City Net once or twice a week. The focus of the show is insane practical reactions and effects that can be made use of by civillians, edgerunners, and gangsters alike - Beakman's World or Bill Nye + The Anarchist's Cookbook. Many of these shows are performed live, and certainly have the spectacle to hold attention.

His show (and stylings) are based on Ray "Reaction" Rodgers, an idol who hosted such a show as Lambda's attempting to imitate while he was growing up.

Difficulty: Easy. Talk fast, talk well, and do ridiculous things.

Style of Play: Reckless thrillseeking with a twist; weapons can be reflavored to chemical reactions, and he excels in environments where he can sow chaos with them.

Character Goals: Live fast, see it all, and (hopefully) don't die young. Achieve fame.

Cyberware To Aspire To: Vomit chemicals (firebreather); cyberlegs for speed.

In-Character Voice & Acting Inspiration: Octane, Apex Legends; Beakman, Beakman's World

Local Expert: Santo Domingo

Science: Chemistry

Light Tats: Neon blue strip (face) x2, Lambda (chest)

Chemskin: Bubbly, like soda

Techhair: Electric green

All edgerunners included within NCG&C are wholly original, made to be played out of the box, and created using the "Complete Package" rules found in RED's Core Rulebook.

lifepath.culturalOrigin: Born in the Mexican Desolation following the skirmishes; moved to North America to teach and was kicked out of NCU for the science being "too practical."
lifepath.personality: Rebellious, headstrong, exciteable, cheery, and with no respect for how anything's ever "supposed" to work.
lifepath.clothingStyle: Urban flash, electric blue oversized jacket with neon static-touch lining.
lifepath.hairStyle: Slicked back to a point, and dyed bright green.
lifepath.valueMost: Excitement, applied sciences, and sharing his knowledge in the most practical ways he knows how.
lifepath.aboutPeople: People are awesome, even the ones trying to kill me! Except for the ones that aren't. I like making sure the awesome ones win.
lifepath.valuedPossession: 101 Demolitions: The Ultimate Guide To Chemical Explosives On The Street
lifepath.familyBackground: Lower middle class, Mexico, circa late 20teens earely 2020s. Pushed out by climate change and CW4. Just because you're smart doesn't mean you're safe, but it does help.
lifepath.childhoodEnvironment: Mama who did the best she could. Lots of hungry nights to pay for schoolbooks. She's looking down on me and smiling, I'm sure of it.
lifepath.familyCrisis: Corpo dad's a pendejo who abandoned mi madre in the streets. Bootlicker who hates me stealing an education from him.
lifepath.lifeGoals: Make mischief! Walk the rebel path and make Reaction Rodgers proud!
lifepath.friends:
"El Diablo," Lambda's "immigrant officer." Definitely here illegally. Definitely loving it.

"Little Chica," Lambda's roommate. Does not like the name, or him. He likes her. They get along.
lifepath.tragicLoveAffairs: Nada. Sure he's dated, but who's got time for that kinda drama?
lifepath.enemies:
Mi Padre, corporate puta. He paid for my education, and didn't like it when I ran off after finishing it. He's part of the (admittedly small) Biotechnica branch based in the remains of Mexico, but likely nothing will happen further between us barring circumstance.

The professor who cost me my academic job at NCU. I blew up his classroom and cost him his job too! >:) He's only got himself to throw at me, but he's probably rotting in a ditch by now. He's definitely after me if he's still alive, though.
